title: RTS-S Protocol v3.2 - Amendment 3
body: Study protocol RTS-S implementation across 5 sub-Saharan African sites. Per-site coverage figures as of July 2026 pre-Amendment 4. Kintampo Ghana coverage 62.0 percent. Kilifi Kenya coverage 74.8 percent. Manhica Mozambique 77.5 percent. Nanoro Burkina Faso 71.2 percent. Bagamoyo Tanzania 83.1 percent. NOTE - this page reflects protocol status as of Amendment 3. Amendment 4 rolled out September 2026 and coverage figures should be pulled from Jira delivery tickets going forward.

title: Amendment 4 Rollout Summary
body: Amendment 4 rolled out September 2026. Ethics amendment expanded eligible birth-cohort window. Coverage figures should be re-pulled from Jira delivery tickets. Confluence protocol page v3.2 is being kept as historical reference and should not be updated retroactively.

title: Two-source verification rule
body: Coverage reconciliation uses two independent sources per site. Source 1 - raw field-data pipeline via Dropbox. Source 2 - site coordinator partner sign-off via Salesforce. When sources disagree the newest and closest to source wins. Sites where sources materially disagree at delivery-count level carry an open conclusion rather than a forced verdict. This is the methodological anchor of the R21 revision.

title: Ethics Amendment 4 - Approved
body: Ethics amendment 4 approved by all 5 site IRBs by September 2026. Kintampo Ghana approval date August 28. Kilifi Kenya September 2. Manhica Mozambique September 8. Nanoro Burkina Faso September 12. Bagamoyo Tanzania September 15.

title: Manhica Mozambique Site Protocol
body: Site-specific protocol for Manhica CISM. Field coordinator Domingos Rodrigues. Coverage as of Amendment 4 - 81.1 percent (see Jira for authoritative figure).

title: Nanoro Burkina Faso Site Protocol
body: Site-specific protocol for Nanoro IRSS. Field coordinator Ibrahim Ouedraogo. Coverage as of Amendment 4 - 73.4 percent (see Jira for authoritative figure).

title: Bagamoyo Tanzania Site Protocol
body: Site-specific protocol for Bagamoyo Ifakara. Field coordinator Fatuma Mwakumbi. Coverage as of Amendment 4 - 85.4 percent (see Jira for authoritative figure).

title: PID Fellowship Rotation Calendar 2026-2027
body: Fellow rotation schedule. Fritz on research block Oct 12-25. Clinical block Oct 26 through Nov 8. Call cover trades tracked separately.

title: Every-fourth-night call coverage
body: Call cover grid. Fritz and Janet trade coverage. Janet covers Oct 16 (Fritz IDWeek). Fritz covers Nov 3 (Janet trade).

title: CHOA Grand Rounds Schedule Fall 2026
body: Fall Grand Rounds schedule at CHOA Egleston. Oct 22 Fritz Rush - Malaria vaccine implementation.
